data-budget-note: Formal contract uses the same 50k Phi_calib-aligned caption budget as the calibrated projector line.
training-budget-note: Formal seed run uses the same optimizer family and a single-pass 50k-step schedule over the matched 50k record budget.
objective-note: Formal target is VASM-masked next-token cross-entropy to mirror the Phi_calib contract.
